files.content:
# phytron.db
# EPICS database for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH using StreamDevice.
#
# Required PVs implemented:
# - POS_RBV
# - MOVE_PLUS
# - MOVE_MINUS
# - STOP
# - SPEED_RBV
#
# Macros:
#   P   - PV prefix, e.g. PHY:01:
#   PORT - Asyn port name, e.g. MCC1
#
# Commissioning notes:
# - Protocol framing is based on verified STX/ETX observations.
# - Exact command bytes for several actions remain placeholders in phytron.proto
#   and must be verified against live traces or vendor documentation.
# - MCC-1 address handling must be checked during commissioning. The context
#   indicates address 0 worked whereas address 1 did not.

record(ai, "$(P)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPosition($(PORT))")
    field(PREC, "3")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
}

record(ai, "$(P)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed($(PORT))")
    field(PREC, "3")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 jog/move plus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus($(PORT))")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Execute")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 jog/move minus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus($(PORT))")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Execute")
}

record(bo, "$(P)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "MCC-1 stop motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMotion($(PORT))")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC
# st.cmd
# IOC startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH using StreamDevice over TCP/IP.
#
# Bring-up notes:
# - TCP/IP port is required to be 22222.
# - Asyn trace is enabled for debugging during commissioning.
# - MCC-1 address handling is inside phytron.proto and must be verified there.
# - The current protocol file uses verified STX/ETX framing but some command
#   payload bytes are placeholders pending confirmation from captures/docs.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

## Register record/device/driver support
# Replace the application name below if your IOC app name differs.
dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

## User-configurable connection settings
# Set the MCC-1 IP address here during deployment.
epicsEnvSet("PREFIX", "PHYTRON:")
epicsEnvSet("PORT",   "MCC1")
epicsEnvSet("HOST",   "192.168.0.10")
epicsEnvSet("TCPPORT","22222")

## Configure StreamDevice/asyn TCP port
# Port 22222 is required by task/context.
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("$(PORT)", "$(HOST):$(TCPPORT)", 0, 0, 0)

## Optional asyn diagnostics for commissioning/debugging
# Increase trace to inspect framed bytes and verify address/command payloads.
asynSetTraceMask("$(PORT)", 0, 0x9)
asynSetTraceIOMask("$(PORT)", 0, 0x2)

## Load records
cd "${TOP}/db"
dbLoadRecords("phytron.db", "P=$(PREFIX),PORT=$(PORT)")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"
iocInit

## Post-init debug reminder
# Verify during commissioning:
# 1) Controller responds on HOST:22222
# 2) Address byte in phytron.proto is correct (observed working case used 0)
# 3) Placeholder command bytes are replaced/confirmed from real MCC-1 traffic
